name: Budget Risk Agent
description: Monitors budget burn, forecasted variance, and department-level overrun probability

name: Spend Anomaly Agent
description: Detects unusual spend patterns across vendors, tools, cloud, and operational workflows

name: Margin Intelligence Agent
description: Connects ARR, cost-to-serve, cloud usage, and support load to customer profitability

name: Vendor Optimization Agent
description: Tracks vendor renewals, usage health, pricing increases, and consolidation opportunities

name: Executive Briefing Agent
description: Generates CFO summaries, board-ready insights, weekly risk briefs, and department action plans
